programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Fact or Fiction? S4 - "The Last Crusade of Indiana Terry"
programme.sub-title: The Last Crusade of Indiana Terry
programme.desc: Terry channels his inner Dr. Jones and tests 1 scene from Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade containing 3 different tests, two of which they will need a tank for. The duo will travel down to Uvalde, TX to visit Drivetanks.com to see if a tank round will topple over a car, and if a 9mm round can travel through three Germans.

programme.title: Xploration Awesome Planet S5 - "Hidden Nature"
programme.desc: In this episode, we see a few hidden parts of nature.

programme.title: Xploration Awesome Planet S5 - "Research in Remote Locations"
programme.desc: In this episode, we visit a few remote areas to see how research and restoration is conducted.

programme.title: Xploration Awesome Planet S5 - "Science Communicators"
programme.desc: In this episode, we’ll meet a few different science communicators

programme.title: Angry Planet S2 - "Hottest & Coldest"
programme.desc: George experiences the most extreme climates in North America. First he visits the hottest place on the continent – Death Valley, then the coldest – Snag, Yukon.

programme.title: Angry Planet S2 - "Hurricanes '07"
programme.desc: We hope Season Two will give us the opportunity to make the quintessential Angry Planet show – a full episode exploring a major hurricane that makes landfall in Florida or the Carolinas.

programme.title: Angry Planet S2 - "B.C. Caving"
programme.desc: In the porous limestone of Canada’s West Coast, great forces are at work under the ground, building and eroding the underground into fantastic shapes. In this episode we’ll witness George’s explorations of these massive underground cave systems.

programme.title: Skuld: A Look into the Future S1 - "Spirit of Discovery"
programme.desc: Dive in and check some ingenious inventions that have changed our daily lives.

programme.title: Skuld: A Look into the Future S1 - "Porsche Sound Nacht"
programme.desc: Go on a journey through the sounds of the most iconic Porsche engines.

programme.title: Skuld: A Look into the Future S1 - "Energy Globe Award 21st - Part 1"
programme.desc: Watch the first part of a feature on the second award ceremony for sustainability projects that can change the world.

programme.title: Xploration Earth 2050 S2 - "Nature Inspires The Future"
programme.desc: Host Chuck Pell sees how humpback whales are showing designers how to save millions in energy costs.

programme.title: Xploration Earth 2050 S2 - "The Future Of Warfare"
programme.desc: Join host Chuck Pell as he plays videos games that are shaping modern battle plans.

programme.title: Xploration Earth 2050 S2 - "Humans Adapt To The Future"
programme.desc: Host Chuck Pell tries out a underwater ‘tent’ that allows explorers to spend hours, and even days, beneath the ocean’s surface.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space S2 - "Space Disasters"
programme.desc: Join host Emily Calandrelli as she explores the most prominent disasters in our journey through the cosmos, and what we learned from each set-back.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space S2 - "Why We Explore"
programme.desc: Host Emily Calandrelli makes the case for space exploration.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space S2 - "Exoplanets"
programme.desc: Join host Emily Calandrelli as she explores the fascinating world of exoplanets.

programme.title: Sci Q S1 - "Who’s the Smartest in the Room?"
programme.sub-title: Who’s the Smartest in the Room?
programme.desc: Fast-paced, pop-science show that will test your science I.Q. Where’s the hottest place in North America? Does a camel’s hump store water or fat? Our planet is moving through space at 67,000 mph, so why don’t we feel it moving?

programme.title: Sci Q S1 - "Dare to be Smart"
programme.desc: Fast-paced, pop-science show that will test your science I.Q. When was the first virtual-reality headset created? What is hydroponic farming? What’s the difference between a grizzly bear and a brown bear?

programme.title: Sci Q S1 - "Sci Smarts"
programme.desc: Fast-paced, pop-science show that will test your science I.Q. What’s the name of the largest fault line in California? How does the Venus Flytrap catch bugs? Is the far side of the moon always dark?

programme.title: Quick Connections with Alie Ward S1 - "Faking Faces"
programme.desc: Alie Ward falls through the wormholes of history into the Louisiana swamps, then journeys on to discover how poker-faced mischief and a mathematical code for winning games have brought us to machines that can invent very real faces.

programme.title: Xploration DIY Sci S5 - "The Higgins Show"
programme.desc: After years of feeling like he’s been the butt of all of Steve Spangler’s jokes, his sidekick Higginsworth threatens to leave unless Steve quits his pranks.

programme.title: Xploration DIY Sci S5 - "Science Fair"
programme.desc: Steve Spangler’s sidekick Higginsworth panics when he has to deliver a science fair project.

programme.title: Xploration DIY Sci S5 - "Museum Of Science, Boston #2"
programme.desc: Host Steve Spangler and his sidekick Higginsworth return to the Museum of Science, Boston, where they take simple demonstrations they’ve done on DIY Sci and make them gigantic!

programme.title: Xploration DIY Sci S5 - "Inclusion"
programme.desc: For first time in his career as an educator, host Steve Spangler is invited to teach a class of kids who are blind or visually impaired.

programme.title: Oddly Satisfying Science S1 - "The Sound of Science"
programme.desc: This week's experiments hit high notes as we discover the physics of theremins, investigate how the outer ear impacts human hearing, and put on a laser show with cymatics.

programme.title: Around the World in 80 Tricks S1 - "Mumbai"
programme.desc: Pete Heat in Manchester and visits Old Trafford and for his finale; he wows a group of friends with his unique and comedic magic skills.

programme.title: Around the World in 80 Tricks S1 - "The Best of…"
programme.desc: In the episode you can see the best of Around the World in 80 Tricks.

programme.title: Combat Forces S1 - "82nd Airborne"
programme.desc: Paratroopers are elite troops, tougher and faster than foot soldiers. We join the 82nd Airborne training for high-risk, behind-enemy-lines missions.

programme.title: Combat Forces S1 - "Navy Divers"
programme.desc: Ship divers tackle dangerous missions at sea, from clearing nets and mines to rescuing lives. We explore their intense training and high-stakes work.

programme.title: Combat Forces S1 - "Combat Trauma Care"
programme.desc: Combat Casualty Care trains soldiers to save lives on the battlefield, ensuring rapid response to injuries from IEDs and other deadly threats.

programme.title: Combat Forces S1 - "Pathfinders"
programme.desc: Pathfinders are elite paratroopers trained to go behind enemy lines, lead air insertions, gather intelligence, and execute high-risk, deadly missions.

programme.title: Bright Now S1 - "Growing Up Hadzabe"
programme.desc: Our earliest ancestors, before developing agriculture as a source of food, formed what is considered hunter-gather societies. The Hadzabe of Tanzania are considered one of the last of these tribes on the planet.

programme.title: Bright Now S1 - "Tastes Like T-Rex"
programme.desc: Modern birds are the most direct descendants of some of the most iconic dinosaurs to ever walk on this planet. Bue can science really enable us to alter chicken embryos to resemble their mightiest ancestor: T-Rex?

programme.title: Bright Now S1 - "Antarctica Science Below Zero"
programme.desc: Antarctica is a mysterious and unexplored continent. Thanks to the Chilean Antarctic Institute and the research center Dynamics of Marine Ecosystems of High Altitudes, scientists are suffering the extreme temperatures to study climate change.

programme.title: Bright Now S1 - "Last American Slave Ship"
programme.desc: The final ship to bring slaves to the United States has been hidden in the swamps of Mobile, Alabama for generations.

programme.title: Earthrise S1 - "Rewilding Patagonia"
programme.desc: We visit Patagonia National Park to find out how it became one of the biggest conservation projects in history.

programme.title: Earthrise S1 - "Protecting Precious Landscapes"
programme.desc: We discover rich landscapes threatened by industrial development and the fight to save these precious ecosystems.

programme.title: Earthrise S1 - "The Case for the Climate"
programme.desc: Earthrise meets some of the lawyers and campaigners who are putting polluters in the dock and forcing systems change through the courts.

programme.title: Earthrise S1 - "Fixing the Food Cycle"
programme.desc: Earthrise travels to Kenya and South Korea to look at two initiatives which are redress some of the imbalances in our unsustainable and wasteful global food system.

programme.title: Predict My Future: The Science of Us S1 - "The Early Years"
programme.desc: The Dunedin Longitudinal Study, begun in 1972 and continuing today. It looks at indicators in childhood behaviors identified by the study.

programme.title: Predict My Future: The Science of Us S1 - "When Teens Run Off The Rails"
programme.sub-title: When Teens Run Off The Rails
programme.desc: Based on the Dunedin Longitudinal Study results, this episode examines why most young adolescents engage in juvenile delinquency of some sort, minor and major.

programme.title: Predict My Future: The Science of Us S1 - "When Genes Mix With The Wrong Environment"
programme.sub-title: When Genes Mix With The Wrong Environment
programme.desc: The Dunedin Study has identified a fundamental developmental mechanism that completely rewrites the nature versus nurture argument

programme.title: Predict My Future: The Science of Us S1 - "Dirt Is Good, Dirt Poor Is Bad"
programme.sub-title: Dirt Is Good, Dirt Poor Is Bad
programme.desc: This episode of the series examines ways in which the results of the Dunedin study have contributed to a new understanding of early influences in a person's life

programme.title: Space Greed S1 - "Space As A Tax Haven"
programme.desc: For the ultra-wealthy, the best part of making money is avoiding taxes. Space could be an astronomical payday, but will all that profit slip by tax free?

programme.title: Space Greed S1 - "Traveling So Fast Time Slows Down"
programme.sub-title: Traveling So Fast Time Slows Down
programme.desc: When we start thinking about traveling at speeds close to the speed of light, our perception of time’s passing starts to get pretty mind-bending.

programme.title: Space Greed S1 - "Space & Shelter"
programme.desc: Resources are tight in space. Everything that goes up there has mass and therefore a cost.

programme.title: Space Greed S1 - "World Wide Wifi"
programme.desc: How will “world wide wifi” change the world again?
